remarks: Charming first floor unit in the heart of Springdale! Conveniently located just steps from the train, shops, restaurants and entertainment. This bright and inviting 2 bedroom apartment features private entrances, an eat in kitchen with a washer and dyer, and charming details throughout, off street parking. Gas is included, as well as, off street parking. Must have good credit, references required Pictures are from recent renovation. Tenant is moving out week of June 22
